channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Mozambique Pairs Up With Zimbabwe, Lesotho and Other Leading Destinations as South Africa Tourism Economy Strengthens With Regional Visitors Driving Cross-Border Travel, Local Spending, SADC Tourism Growth and Economic Connections Across So
item.description: via Travel And Tour World #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Travel And Tour World

item.title: Zimbabwe Records 11% Tourism Growth in Q1 2026 with New Financing Strategy for Tour Operators
item.description: via Nomad Lawyer #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nomad Lawyer

item.title: Zimbabwe Outpaces Namibia, Seychelles, Botswana And More Countries In Africa’s Tourism Growth Race As Stunning Eleven Percent Year-On-Year Visitor Surge Combines With Bold Financing Strategy To Transform Tourism, Boost Travel And Unlock New
item.description: via Travel And Tour World #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Travel And Tour World

item.title: GettyImages-2264205901
item.description: Experienced all-rounder Sikandar Raza has become Zimbabwe’s most-capped player during the side’s loss to Bangladesh in Bulawayo on Sunday. The match was Raza’s 314th at international level, with the 40-year-old having featured in 22 Tests, 156 ODIs and 136 T20Is since making his via Icc #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Icc

item.title: Fastjet adds Airbus A320 to meet peak travel demand @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Fastjet adds Airbus A320 to meet peak travel demand – herald Nelson Gahadza, FASTJET Zimbabwe will introduce an Airbus A320-200 to its fleet from August 1, 2026, under a short-term lease agreement to increase capacity in response to rising passenger demand during the peak via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Pump and Steel to revive heavy rail production @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Pump and Steel to revive heavy rail production – herald Business Writer LEADING local engineering firm Pump and Steel Suppliers is preparing to enter the heavy rail manufacturing sector as it plans to revive production capabilities formerly held by the defunct Zimbabwe En via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Growing ZiG uptake signals currency confidence @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Growing ZiG uptake signals currency confidence – herald Gibson Nyikadzino Senior Reporter Demand for the ZiG currency continues to rise following the implementation of robust policies anchoring stability, before the country transitions into a mono-currency regime, Reserve via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Zimbabwe Launches a Bold Tourism Financing Strategy to Support Tour Operators and Refinance Safaris in Victoria Falls, Hwange, and Mana Pools: New Travel Alert
item.description: via Nomad Lawyer #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nomad Lawyer

item.title: Nation meets key cancer milestone
item.description: ZIMBABWE is making headway in its fight against cervical cancer, the leading cause of cancer-related deaths among women in the country. This... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your choice! Subscriptions via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: US$340m broadband investment drive unveiled
item.description: Oliver Kazunga, ZIMBABWE has unveiled US$340,1 million worth of broadband investment projects expected to generate more than US$3,8 billion in revenue, signalling a major push to accelerate digital transformation... via H-metro #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: H-metro

item.title: Junior Social Media Assistant — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Editorial Coordinator — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Pitch, draft and edit original explainers. Bring fresh editorial angles. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Data Analyst — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Turn Zimbabwe public data into clear visual stories. Bring new data ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Business Development Associate — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
